Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and promotes appreciation of culture (Target 4.7) through understanding 'cultural content presented by authors and their works'.

Gender Equality.reason: The curriculum explicitly includes the study of a prominent female author, '女性詞人李清照' (female ci-poet Li Qingzhao), contributing to the recognition of women's cultural contributions.
evidence: 女性詞人李清照：〈金石錄後序〉等

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course safeguards cultural heritage (Target 11.4) by studying classical literature and aims to 'understand the cultural content presented by authors and their works'.

Life on Land.reason: The course analyzes prose with '山水' (landscape) as a theme, inferring a connection to the appreciation of terrestrial and mountain ecosystems (Targets 15.1, 15.4).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course analyzes themes of '貶謫' (exile) and '論忠' (discussing loyalty), which relate to historical concepts of justice. The copyright rule also supports the rule of law (Target 16.3).
evidence: 論忠：楊慎〈新都縣八陣圖記〉
